title: Sceptridium minus
intro: Sceptridium minus, also known as Chinese bird's nest fern or Chinese spleenwort, is a species of plant in the family Ophioglossaceae, characterized by its unique, spore-bearing structures that resemble bird's nests. The plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine to promote health and longevity, with reported health benefits including improved respiratory function, enhanced immune response, and increased energy levels. The bioactive constituents of Sceptridium minus include various polyphenolic compounds, including flavonoids and phenolic acids, as well as polysaccharides with immunomodulatory and anti-inflammatory properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, Sceptridium minus is often prepared as a decoction or capsule, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to create tonics and adaptogenic formulas.
